name: Chocolate Hazelnut Brandy Torte with Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 7 oz PEAK FREEN SWEET-MEAL BISCUITS, coarsely broken
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, melt chocolate and butter together.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs and sugar at high speed until lemon-colored.
3. Add the chocolate/butter mixture and beat at medium speed until the butter is completely mixed in.
4. Add the brandy and mix thoroughly.
5. Pour the mixture over the biscuits.
6. Mix well.
7. Line a 9-inch cake pan with plastic wrap.
8. Pour in the mixture and cover with plastic wrap.
9. Freeze until ready to serve.
